must_read_items.why_required: 确认新增素材默认补充合并
确认 Codex 侧执行前动作策略
确认任务进入正确 workflow
确认当前候选片上下文
确认审片包和旧候选证据
确认不能擅自改锁稿

must_read_items.required_section: old material inventory or explicit missing report
must_read_items.why_required: 新增素材不能默认替代旧素材

must_read_items.required_section: new material inventory or explicit missing report

must_read_items.required_section: material parse pack or explicit missing report

optional_read_items.why_optional: 如存在更细素材审计报告，可补充读取。

mandatory_read_manifest.done_when: 已证明新增素材默认 additive_merge；若旧/新素材清单或素材解析包只有 MISSING_REPORT，则只允许诊断，真实剪辑执行 blocked。
blocked_if: old or new material inventory only represented by MISSING_REPORT
material parse pack only represented by MISSING_REPORT
mandatory_read_manifest.user_prompt_summary: 用户新增几个素材，要求重新剪；未声明只用新增素材，未声明旧素材全部废弃。

must_read_items.source_path: GPT数据源/11_项目状态动作总控器_机制推理层.md
must_read_items.why_required: 确认写 completed 前必须完成真实性预检

确认 Codex 不能把技术产物判成内容完成

must_read_items.required_section: completion truth / no completed without verification
must_read_items.why_required: 确认 full.mp4 exists 不能证明完成
确认审片包指针存在；即使存在，也不能替代 completion_truth_preflight
确认未 Git 同步不得 completed

blocked_if: technical validation treated as content validation

must_read_items.why_required: 确认旧 Qwen / 阿里 B 只能作参考锚点

mandatory_read_manifest.done_when: 已证明旧 Qwen / 阿里 B 仅作参考锚点，正式声音锁仍是 MiniMax + oldBMinimax20260528010200。
blocked_if: old Qwen restored as formal provider
MiniMax system voice substituted for old B
user listening confirmation missing but voice_validation passed
